title: Christmas Activity Book Set for Kids – 3 Pack – Colouring Book (A4), Dot to Dot & Puzzle Book – 48 Pages Each – Recycled Paper – Festive Activity Fun – Ideal Stocking Filler
features: 🎄3 Festive Activity Books in One Set – Includes a large A4 Christmas Colouring Book, a Dot to Dot Book, and a Christmas Activity Puzzle Book – each packed with 48 themed pages.
🖍️ Colouring Book (A4 Size) – Filled with delightful festive characters like Santa, elves, snowflakes and Christmas stockings, this book encourages creativity and imaginative play.
🔢 Dot to Dot Book (Purple Cover) – Features 48 connect-the-dots puzzles with festive scenes including Santa in his sleigh – perfect for building early counting skills.
🎁 Christmas Puzzle Activity Book – Bursting with fun including mazes, spot the difference, matching games, and more to keep little ones entertained and learning.
♻️ Eco-Friendly & Printed on Recycled Paper – All books in this set are made using recycled materials, making them a thoughtful and planet-friendly choice.
🎅 Perfect Gift for Kids Aged 3–8 – A fantastic addition to stockings, Christmas Eve boxes, party bags or school rewards. A fun and educational festive treat!
description: 🎄 3-in-1 Christmas Activity Book Set – Colouring (A4), Dot to Dot & Puzzle Fun! Get your kids excited for the holidays with this charming Christmas activity book bundle ! With three different books and 48 pages in each , children can enjoy hours of festive fun without screens. 🖍️ A4 Christmas Colouring Book Let creativity run wild with cheerful Christmas illustrations , from elves and reindeer to stockings and snowy scenes. The large A4 format makes it easy for little hands to colour. 🔢 Dot to Dot Activity Book (Purple Cover) Watch festive scenes come to life as children connect the dots! This book helps with number sequencing and fine motor skills , and features Santa, sleighs, and more. 🧠 Christmas Puzzle Activity Book Packed with exciting challenges like mazes, spot the difference, matching games , and more – all set in a magical Christmas world. Perfect for rainy days and quiet time. ♻️ Kind to the Planet Printed on recycled paper , this book set is a great eco-friendly option for families who care about sustainability during the holidays. 🎅 Ideal for Ages 3 to 8 Whether you’re buying for your child, grandchild, students or party guests, this bundle is a brilliant stocking filler or Christmas gift that’s both fun and educational.
